run_summary.summary: 🚨 Brandi is still blocked — Gmail OAuth token expired. No emails scanned (2026-06-20, run 2). The re-auth helper script at scripts/gmail-reauth.mjs is ready and waiting. Until re-authorized, Brandi cannot monitor your inbox.
run_summary.error: Gmail OAuth token expired or revoked (invalid_grant). Re-authorization required.

suggestions.message: ACTION NEEDED: Gmail token is expired — Brandi has been unable to scan emails. Run `node scripts/gmail-reauth.mjs` locally to open a browser consent screen for hartmanncollabs@gmail.com. After re-authorizing, copy the new refresh token into your environment config (Vercel env vars or .env.local). Full instructions print to the terminal when the script runs.
